name: Casual / conversational
sample: No problem — I’ll check it this afternoon.

name: Social / business / middle-class dinner
contexts: work email, product copy, polite social
sample: Thanks for sending this over. I took a look.

name: Formal / institutional
sample: Please submit the documents by 5:00 p.m. on Friday, May 22, 2026.

name: Service / customer support
sample: I can help with that — what date works best for you?

name: Neighbour/community notice
contexts: HOA where relevant, apartment list, school/team messages
sample: Heads up: trash pickup is delayed until Friday.
